response.justification: Bogdan meets the 15-year experience minimum and holds appropriate seniority (Staff Engineer), with strong execution across full-stack engineering and current AI infrastructure work (MCP frameworks). However, there is a significant gap in demonstrated AI expertise and platform recognition that the role requires. While the Northwind Labs founder experience shows innovation capability, it's in geo-data rather than AI, and there's limited evidence of the strategic cloud/AI platform focus or recognized technical leadership in AI that a Principal Engineer in this specialization requires.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering across full-stack, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure—demonstrates execution depth required for technical leadership
Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, showing active engagement with AI technologies
Founder of Northwind Labs and history of building open-source platforms demonstrates innovation and entrepreneurial capability
concerns: No demonstrated deep AI/ML expertise or recognition in the field; limited evidence of products or platforms built with AI as core differentiation

Resume emphasizes execution and builder skills over strategic advisory or platform vision—the role requires partnership on 'identifying future state of cloud products' and advising strategic customers on cutting-edge adoption
No advanced degree in AI/ML field and limited evidence of cloud platform architecture expertise (mentions AWS CDK but no broader cloud strategy or platform experience)

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and products
Current AI infrastructure work at Acme
